titleStmt.title: SII 42.130: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 130. (A.R. No. B. 146 of 1954-55.) Ēlēśvaram, Devarakonda Taluk, Nalgonda District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a red-stone slab set up in front of the Śiva temple.

Dated C.V. year 33, Plava, Āshāḍha śu. 11, Wednesday; C.V. 33 equivalent to Śaka 1031 = A.D. 1109, but the cyclic year is Virōdhin. Āshāḍha, śu. 11 fell on Thursday. It corresponds to A.D. 1109, June 10.
Registers a gift of the village Pedda-Kōḍūru by the king for worship and offerings to god Ēlēśvara. The king is stated to belong to the solar race and bears the epithet, Kōḍūrupuravarēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatuccā
ḷukya va¨rṣamu
lu 33 gu plava saṁ
vatsara Āsā(ṣā)ḍha su(śu)
11 budhavāramu
nāṁḍu svasti samadi(dhi)
gada(ta) paṁcamahāśa
bda mahāmaṁḍalē
sva(śva)ra paramamāhēśvara
kōḍū¨rppura va
rēśvara sū¨ryyavaṁ
śōdbhava kuḷatilaka
kāsya(śya)pagōtra karikā
lānvaya nāmā
di samasta prasa(śa)sti
śa(sa)hitamu śrī ma
nmahāmaṇḍalēśvara
kaṁdūri gōka¨rnna
dēvacōḍa mahārā
julu śrī Ēlēśvaradē
vara Aṁgaraṁga(bhōgaraṁga)redundant.
bhōgamulaku dhū
padīpanivēdyamula
kuṁ beṭṭa(dda) kōḍūru Ā
caṁdrā¨rkkasthāI(yi)gā Icci
timi [.] Ī datti Ācaṁdrā
[¨r]kamugā naḍapagala
vāru
Digital edition of SII 42.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
